name: Lollipoвҳ…Yummy Way
desc:
1 Tuner + 1 non-Tuner monster
For this card's Synchro Summon, you can treat 1 Link-1 monster you control as a Level 1 Tuner. You can only use each of the following effects of "Lollipoвҳ…Yummy Way" once per turn. If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 2 "Yummy" monsters from your GY, but negate their effects. When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can return this card to the Extra Deck; Special Summon up to 2 "Yummy" monsters from your GY.
